required_operator_inputs: repair the real Projection-and-Flow regression where the public programmable or smooth-escape color path ignores projection_and_flow_pressure_threshold while the legacy root_basin path still reacts
keep the repair bounded to Projection-and-Flow programmable color authority rather than reopening generic color-pipeline expansion, Explaino work, renderer replacement, or a broad engine refactor
preserve FractalSampleResult and SampleFractalPoints as the shipped legacy sampling surfaces while the programmable color-path repair lands
close only with focused native proof, runtime publish, published-runtime Projection-and-Flow proof, hostile audit, checkpoint commit, machine receipts, push, and the committed-head stale-plan gate
forbidden_operator_prompts: claim Projection-and-Flow is repaired while smooth_escape or the programmable basin path still hashes the same across materially different pressure thresholds on the same lane
replace SampleFractalPoints or FractalSampleResult instead of preserving the shipped legacy sampling path
widen into generic color-pipeline feature expansion, Explaino integration, renderer replacement, or a generic engine rewrite
close the slice without commit, machine receipts, hostile-audit proof, push, and a committed-head stale-plan reread

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The Projection-and-Flow pressure-threshold programmable color regression contract validates successfully

The Projection-and-Flow pressure-threshold programmable color regression hostile-audit validator passes
